metadata.title: Index Checker
metadata.description: Make sure your index "MOC" files (notes or Canvas) contain all links they should contain.

regex.source: Notice("Checking Indexes - waiting for files to catch up..", 3e4)
regex.target: Notice("正在检查索引 - 等待文件同步完成..", 3e4)
Notice("警告 - 索引检查插件:\n" + m, 0)
.error("解析用户正则表达式时出错: ", pattern, err)

regex.source: .setText("Are you sure? Once done it can't be reversed")
.setName("Is index file in root folder named differently?")
regex.target: .setName("根目录的索引文件是否使用不同命名？")

regex.source: .setName("Should files in nested folders be referenced in indexes?")
regex.target: .setName("是否在索引中引用嵌套文件夹中的文件？")

regex.source: .setName("Should non-notes files (like images) be linked in indexes?")
regex.target: .setName("是否在索引中链接非笔记文件（如图片）？")
.setName("在开头添加缺失链接（而非末尾）？")

regex.source: .setName("How separate output file should be named?")
.setName("Where files missing in Canvas indexes should be added?")
regex.target: .setName("Canvas索引中缺失的文件应添加至何处？")

regex.source: .setName("Should files added to Canvas index be grouped?")
.setName("Where on Canvas missing files should be placed?")
regex.target: .setName("缺失文件应放置在Canvas的哪个位置？")

regex.source: .setName("What dimensions should files added to Canvas be?")
regex.target: .setName("添加到Canvas的文件尺寸应为多少？")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use [FOLDER] placeholder to specify current folder's name. Vault's name will be used as [FOLDER] in root directory. You can use RegEx pattern as follows /.../")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用[FOLDER]占位符指定当前文件夹名。在根目录中，仓库名称将作为[FOLDER]。可使用正则表达式，如/.../")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can use [VAULT] placeholder to specify vault's name.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可使用[VAULT]占位符指定仓库名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Check if all files (not just .md or .canvas) should be refereced in respective indexes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("检查是否所有文件（不仅是.md或.canvas）都应在相应索引中被引用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can specify file name patterns, one for each line. Use * as wildcard(any character) and [FOLDER], [VAULT], [INDEX] for respective filenames. RegEx can be used like this /.../ too.  ")
regex.target: .setDesc("可指定文件名模式（每行一个）。使用*作为通配符，[FOLDER]、[VAULT]、[INDEX]对应相应文件名。也可使用正则表达式如/.../。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Each link will occupy its own line for easy copying. Use [LINKS] plug to indicate where they should go.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每个链接独占一行以便复制。使用[LINKS]占位符指定插入位置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If checked, missing links will be added to the beginning of index file, not the end.")
regex.target: .setDesc("勾选后，缺失链接将添加至索引文件开头而非末尾。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use [FOLDER] and [INDEX] to specify folder name and current index filename.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用[FOLDER]和[INDEX]指定文件夹名和当前索引文件名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Red mark in file explorer will persist until " + (settings.outputMode == "FILE" /* FILE */ ? "all links are removed from the file (presumably moved to their place in index)." : "index file is not touched (changed in some way).")
regex.target: .setDesc("文件管理器中的红色标记将保留，直到" + (settings.outputMode == "FILE" /* FILE */ ? "所有链接从文件中移除（可能已移至索引）。" : "索引文件未被修改。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Will check automatically every time the vault is opened. Alternatively you can trigger check manually, see below.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每次打开仓库时自动检查。也可手动触发检查，见下文。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also use a button on the left side of your workspase.")
regex.target: .setDesc("也可使用工作区左侧的按钮。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can use .canvas file as indexes as easy as .md (note) files. Click to see options specific to Canvas indexes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可将.canvas文件作为索引，用法与.md（笔记）文件相同。点击查看Canvas索引专属选项。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(
        "Select DEFAULT to use the same mode as for .md (note) indexes (see option above)." + (settings.canvasMode === null ? ` Currently "${outputModsOptions[settings.outputMode].replace(" ", "\xA0")
regex.target:
.setDesc(
        "选择DEFAULT以使用与.md（笔记）索引相同的模式（见上方选项）。" + (settings.canvasMode === null ? ` 当前为"${outputModsOptions[settings.outputMode].replace(" ", "\xA0")

regex.source: .setDesc("Recommended for easy handling. You can specify how group should be titled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("推荐用于便捷管理。可指定组标题格式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can specify location (corner) in reference to existing Canvas content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可指定相对于Canvas现有内容的位置（角落）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The height of 50 is currently the minimum needed for the filename to fit. Choose width to your liking.")
regex.target: .setDesc("高度50是显示文件名所需的最小值。宽度可根据喜好调整。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You've clicked something and it's not working any more? This might help.")
regex.target: .setDesc("点击后功能异常？此操作可能有帮助。")
